name: Through the fog
short_description: You will take on the role of a detective and dive into a dark world from a first-person perspective. What will you have to do? Explore locations in search of clues. Make assumptions and write them down in your diary. Solve puzzles.Run away and hide from your demons.
detailed_description:
Through the fog is a first-person thriller game. You find yourself in 20th century England as a detective. What will you have to do?

  • Explore locations in search of clues.

  • Interact with objects.

  • Make assumptions, make choices in your journal and write them down. Each assumption can help you get to the truth.

  • Solve puzzles.

  • Run away and hide from your demons.

    In addition, the game has a part with a visual novel telling about what is happening around. All this will help to learn the story of a detective with PTSD.

After a terrible war, he tries to adapt to civilian life. Now he is a detective working on cases that no one else will take on. Paranormal, inexplicable, frightening. His first job is to solve an incident in which neither the testimony nor the "reality" matches up.
